data.description: RBC increases Toll Brothers’ price target from $144 to $161.

data.title: Fed minutes hint at potential rate hikes amidst rising inflation concerns; policymakers cautious about easing until clear signs of disinflation progress.
data.description: Federal Reserve policymakers stated that they may not need to implement measures to ease the economy until there is a clear sign that the rate of disinflation is definitively improving.

data.title: Activist investor suggests Riot could make $21B from AI/HPC focus, urges swift action on "material deals."
data.description: Starboard Value emphasized the importance of urgency for Riot to swiftly finalize more significant deals regarding Artificial Intelligence (AI) and High Performance Computing (HPC). The message underscores the pressing need for Riot to quickly secure additional substantial agreements in these areas.

data.title: Bearish trend in Ether suggests $1.1K target. Onchain data hints at potential dip for a good buy opportunity.
data.description: Data from the Ethereum blockchain and a bearish pennant formation on the daily chart indicate a potential downturn towards the $1,100 mark. The question arises whether a drop to this level could present a significant buying opportunity for investors looking at long-term gains.
RBC cuts Wingstop target from $350 to $340.
ASX 200 finishes 0.9% higher at 9,086.20 points.

data.title: Book "The Blue, The Gold, and The Gray" explores America's history from 1492 to 1865, connecting events like exploration, gold rushes, and the Civil War. Published in Shawnee, Colo.
data.description: In a recent publication dated February 19, 2026, in SHAWNEE, Colo., a detailed historical analysis was presented, connecting exploration, gold rushes, and the Civil War within the timeline of 1492 to 1865. Typically, American history is segmented into separate events such as revolutions, gold rushes, and the Civil War. However, this comprehensive overview integrates these significant historical periods, providing a cohesive narrative. The analysis aims to offer a broader perspective on the historical trajectory of the United States from the early exploration period in 1492 to the conclusion of the Civil War in 1865.

data.title: Rio Tinto reports solid results, with +8% CuEq production and focus on cost discipline.CEO addresses safety concerns after colleague's death.
data.description: Rio Tinto CEO Simon Trott emphasized the company's unwavering focus on safety following the unfortunate passing of a team member at the Simandou project. Trott expressed deep commitment to understanding the incident and announced plans for a thorough investigation. The company reported positive financial results, showcasing an 8% increase in CuEq production. Trott highlighted this progress as Rio Tinto continues to implement a more robust and streamlined approach to operations.

PM Modi says AI must be accessible and inclusive for all, stressing the need to democratize the technology and ensure humans do not become mere data points; calls for a broad yet responsible vision for AI.

data.title: SOL price may head to $50 as onchain data suggests a potential bottom. Analysts are cautious due to bearish trends.
data.description: The price of SOL is showing a bearish trend across various chart timeframes, prompting analysts to set a short-term target of $50. The MVRV indicator for SOL is at an "extreme" level, raising concerns about a potential price crash.
Capstone Copper sees CIBC lower rating to Neutral and trim target price to C$16 from C$20.

data.title: Sell-off in Chinese E.V. firms as competition rises. Investors worried about slowing sales and shorter cycles.
data.description: Investors are offloading shares in Chinese electric vehicle (E.V.) firms due to fears surrounding increasing competition and quicker production cycles, suggesting that the era of rapid growth may be coming to an end.

data.title: US Clarity Act likely to pass by April: Senator Bernie Moreno. Odds of 2026 passage briefly hit 90% after his comments.
data.description: Chances of the US CLARITY Act being passed in 2026 saw a sudden increase, reaching 90% on Polymarket. This surge followed positive remarks made by US Senator Bernie Moreno.

data.title: transcosmos signs United Nations Global Compact to promote sustainable society & well-being by following Ten Principles; Feb 19, 2026.
data.description: transcosmos recently declared their commitment to fostering a sustainable society and enhancing societal welfare by endorsing the Ten Principles of the UNGC. On February 19, 2026, the company revealed its participation in the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC), a global initiative that aims to address pressing issues by aligning with key principles. This move signifies transcosmos' dedication to promoting responsible business practices and contributing to the achievement of sustainable development goals.

data.title: Harju Elekter Group had strong 2025 results, with revenue matching 2024 levels. Q4 saw highest revenue, turning losses into profits.
data.description: In the latest financial report, Harju Elekter concluded the year with robust performance. The revenue matched that of 2024, aligning with the Group's standard operational capacity and order levels. Notably, the final quarter of the year saw the highest revenue of all quarters. Compared to the same period in the prior year, the company managed to transform losses into modest profits, a commendable feat considering it is typically a slow season for the Group.

data.title: Kyndryl opens Cyber Defense Operations Center in India to streamline IT operations, enhancing resilience and response speed.
data.description: Kyndryl has recently introduced its maiden Cyber Defense center in India, merging network and security operations for enhanced resilience, quicker response time, and fortified compliance measures. The hub, headquartered in New York, was unveiled on February 19, 2026. As a prominent supplier of crucial enterprise technology services, Kyndryl's move aims to boost overall operational efficiency and cybersecurity.

data.title: Coinbase's Base now shifting to its own architecture, to streamline operations. Team ensures open-source protocol for devs to innovate.
data.description: The engineering team at The Base confirmed that the protocol will continue to be open-source. They have invited developers to keep creating distinctive implementations.
